examples: The Yemeni rial or Yemeni riyal is the currency of Yemen.
The Omani rial (currency code: OMR) is the official currency of Oman.
As of January 18, 2005, one Omani Rial was worth 2.59067 United States dollars.
The central bank's website showed the exchange rate as 11, 180 rial to one US dollar.
The rial is dying and hyperinflation is creating real potential for full-fledged economic panic.
